title: Cyanobacteria Total Lipid Extraction
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ibkcakw

steps.title: Prepare lipid extraction solvent (step 2)...
steps.instruction: Prepare lipid extraction solvent (step 2) with a 1:1 ratio of butanol and lab purified water (water-saturated butanol, and lab purified water Butanol Fischer Scientific Catalog #71-36-3

steps.title: Extraction solvent is a 15:15:5:1:0
steps.instruction: Extraction solvent is a 15:15:5:1:0.18 ratio by volume solvent composed of 95% ethanol, water, diethyl ether, pyridine, and 4.2 N ammonium hydroxide Ethanol P212121 Catalog #BE-BDH1156 Diethyl ether Fisher Scientific Catalog #60-29-7 Pyridine Fisher Scientific Catalog #110-86-1 Ammonium hydroxide Fisher Scientific Catalog #7664-41-7

steps.title: Grow cultures to log phase and...
steps.instruction: Grow cultures to log phase and collect 2 mL in 2 mL microfuge tube. undetermined If the sample is a liquid environmental sample, simply proceed without grow up peroid. A minimum of 500 µL of sample is needed.

steps.title: Optional step
steps.instruction: Optional step : Remove a small aliquot (100 µL) of culture and fix with 5% by volume glutaraldehyde for later cell counts for normalizing lipid amounts. Store at 20ºC. 25% Glutaraldehyde Contributed by users

steps.title: Pellet culture at 10,000 xg, 2 min 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Pellet culture at 10,000 xg, 2 min 00:02:00

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant

steps.title: Add 1 mL extraction solvent to resuspend pellet undetermined
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL extraction solvent to resuspend pellet undetermined

steps.title: Add 100 µL of 150 µm...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of 150 µm glass beads in a 1 dram vial undetermined

steps.title: Vortex sample, 5 sec 00:00:05
steps.instruction: Vortex sample, 5 sec 00:00:05

steps.title: Incubate sample in a 60ºC water...
steps.instruction: Incubate sample in a 60ºC water bath for 20 min 00:20:00

steps.title: Centrifuge sample at 10,000 xg for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge sample at 10,000 xg for 10 min in a benchtop microcentrifuge 00:10:00

steps.title: Remove supernatant to a glass vial...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant to a glass vial All extractions for a single sample will be added to the same sample glass vial.

steps.title: Repeat steps 7 and 9-12; DO...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 7 and 9-12; DO NOT add more glass beads

steps.title: Add 150 µL water to microfuge tube undetermined
steps.instruction: Add 150 µL water to microfuge tube undetermined

steps.title: Vigorously shake water-saturated butanol (1:1 ratio)...
steps.instruction: Vigorously shake water-saturated butanol (1:1 ratio) to mix and add 300 µL to microfuge tube undetermined Butanol Fischer Scientific Catalog #71-36-3

steps.title: Vortex sample, 5 sec 00:00:05
steps.instruction: Vortex sample, 5 sec 00:00:05

steps.title: Remove top butanol phase to sample glass vial
steps.instruction: Remove top butanol phase to sample glass vial

steps.title: Repeat steps 15-17
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 15-17

steps.title: Either immediately dry sample under N...
steps.instruction: Either immediately dry sample under N 2 for LCMS or store overnight at -20ºC or longer term storage at -80ºC

steps.title: Prepare lipid extraction solvent as in...
steps.instruction: Prepare lipid extraction solvent as in steps 1-2 of version 1 above

steps.title: Use a Sterivex cutter to open the plastic unit
steps.instruction: Use a Sterivex cutter to open the plastic unit. Using a sterile razor blade, cut filter off of unit and cut into small pieces. Place filter pieces in a 2 mL microfuge tube.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of extraction solvent to resuspend pellet undetermined
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of extraction solvent to resuspend pellet undetermined

steps.title: Add 100 µL of 150 µm glass beads undetermined
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of 150 µm glass beads undetermined

steps.title: Vortex sample very vigorously, 5 sec...
steps.instruction: Vortex sample very vigorously, 5 sec -- do not want filter pieces to setlle at the bottom of microfuge tube 00:00:05

steps.title: Incubate sample in a 60ºC water...
steps.instruction: Incubate sample in a 60ºC water bath for 20 min 00:20:00

steps.title: Centrifuge sample at 10,000 xg, 10...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge sample at 10,000 xg, 10 min in a benchtop microcentrifuge 00:10:00

steps.title: Remove supernatant to a glass vial...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant to a glass vial All extractions for a single sample will be added to the same glass vial.

steps.title: Repeat steps 22 and 24-27; DO...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 22 and 24-27; DO NOT add more glass beads

steps.title: Add 150 µL water to microfuge tube undetermined
steps.instruction: Add 150 µL water to microfuge tube undetermined

steps.title: Vigorously shake water-saturated butanol to mix...
steps.instruction: Vigorously shake water-saturated butanol to mix (1:1 ratio) and add 300 µL to microfuge tube undetermined

steps.title: Vortex sample
steps.instruction: Vortex sample

steps.title: Remove top butanol phase to sample glass vial
steps.instruction: Remove top butanol phase to sample glass vial

steps.title: Repeat steps 30-32
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 30-32

steps.title: Either immediately dry sample under N...
steps.instruction: Either immediately dry sample under N 2 for LCMS or store overnight at -20ºC or longer term storage at -80ºC
